zh-CN.name: 数字5
zh-CN.intro: 数字5比4多一个，一只手有五根手指，帮我们学会数数。5真是个有趣的数字！

story.title: 🖐五根手指
story.body: 宝宝伸出小手，我们一起数：一、二、三、四、五！五根手指站成一排。大拇指粗粗的，力气大；食指很灵活，能指东西；中指个子最高；无名指爱漂亮；小拇指最小，但能拉勾勾。五根手指各有本领，它们一起合作，能拿勺子、画画、拍手。五根手指是好朋友，永远不分开！

knowledge.title: 为什么一只手有五根手指？
knowledge.body: 很久很久以前，人类的祖先慢慢长出了五根手指。五根手指不长不短，正好能抓住东西，还能做许多灵巧的动作。

en.name: Five
en.intro: Five is one more than four. One hand has five fingers, helping us learn to count. Five is such a fun number!

story.title: 🖐Five Fingers
story.body: Stretch out your hand, little one. Let's count together: one, two, three, four, five! Five fingers stand in a row. The thumb is thick and strong; the index finger is flexible and points; the middle finger is the tallest; the ring finger loves to be pretty; the pinky is the smallest but can make pinky promises. Each finger has a special job. Together they can hold a spoon, draw pictures, and clap hands. Five fingers are best friends, never apart!

knowledge.title: Why does one hand have five fingers?
knowledge.body: A long, long time ago, human ancestors grew five fingers. Five fingers are just right—not too long, not too short—to grab things and do many clever movements.
